description_long: This hammer features a large, rectangular black head with beveled edges and a metallic cap on top, giving it a robust and heavy-duty appearance. The head is adorned with a simple, angular engraving on both broad faces, adding a touch of stylized detail. The handle is straight and cylindrical, wrapped in a brown material that suggests a comfortable grip, and is capped with a gold-colored ring at the base, possibly for hanging or attaching a lanyard. The transition between the head and handle is reinforced with a black collar, enhancing durability. The overall design is reminiscent of a sledgehammer or a ceremonial hammer, with a modern, stylized aesthetic. The surfaces appear smooth and well-finished, with no visible signs of wear or damage.
description: A stylized, heavy-duty hammer with a large black rectangular head, engraved face, and a brown straight handle ending in a gold ring.
description_view_0: Front view shows the engraved face of the black hammer head, the straight brown handle, and the gold ring at the base.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the rectangular profile of the hammer head and the cylindrical handle, with the gold ring visible at the bottom.
description_view_2: Rear view mirrors the front, showing the opposite engraved face and the same handle and ring details.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the rectangular side of the head and the handle alignment.
attribute_handle_type: Straight cylindrical handle, likely wood, wrapped in brown leather for grip, with a gold-colored metal ring at the base.
attribute_head_type: Large rectangular sledge-type head, black in color, with beveled edges and a metallic cap on top; both broad faces feature a simple engraved design.
attribute_attachment_or_accessory: gold-colored ring at the base of the handle
